assumption_text: The focal bundle is restricted to the bounded siege and bombardment of West Beirut rather than all Lebanon War deaths.
rationale: This matches the user's target and improves conceptual comparability with other urban-destruction episodes.

assumption_text: Current casualty series are treated as provisional because the accessible evidence is tertiary and not perfectly harmonized in geography or time.
rationale: Honesty about source quality is preferable to false precision.

assumption_text: Aggregate siege casualty estimates do not receive a single direct inflicting side code in machine-readable totals.
rationale: The available series either do not specify the direct inflictor or refer to military activity of multiple sides in the siege.
